name: claude-hooks-db-ownership
tags: db ownership, mcp boundary, task status, session_id, tool prefix
body:
DB ownership: claude_for_mac_local has NO access to any claude-hooks DB.

All tasks__*, memory__*, hooks__*, session__* tools → mcp__claude-hooks__* only.
session_id → always read from ## Turn state block, or use hooks__session_id (no active task required, built-in retry).

Task status transitions: see [[claude-hooks-task-state-machine]] — open→{done,blocked}, blocked→open, any→abandoned. 'active' is not a DB status (see [[tasks-active-status-checkpoint-only]]); it exists only in the LangGraph checkpoint.

**Correction (2026-07-05):** removed the stale "open → active → done" claim — verified against src/tools/tasks.py's _TRANSITIONS dict directly, which has no 'active' entry at all.
